subject: biologi
distributionPolicy: 1200 is a future candidate target only. Quotas reserve review capacity per section placeholder; they do not authorize generation.
fatalGates: no runtime import or KV write order
forbiddenInCandidates: private source locator in public copy

requiredQuestionShapeWhenUnlocked.subject: biologi

distractorRationales.rationale: why this wrong option reveals a misconception

requiredQuestionShapeWhenUnlocked.runtimeProjection: Kemi-compatible typ, niva, delkapitel and stella projection
